title: orobanche alba var. raddeana
intro: Orobanche alba var. raddeana is a type of parasitic plant that belongs to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae), commonly found in mountainous and grassland regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an expectorant and a diaphoretic, helping to relieve respiratory issues and fever. The health benefits of Orobanche alba var. raddeana include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, coughs, and respiratory infections.
